produces: process-utils.js — spawnSidecar and shutdown cleanup; companion to host.js (builder-1a).
rationale: Encapsulates child_process so section-2 (now-playing-source) does not call spawn directly (per contract). Registers SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers to kill orphan sidecar children when the host terminates the plugin — satisfies S1.A4 (sidecar supervision). Does not implement the SMTC logic itself; that lives in the PowerShell script delivered by section-2.
